section_miscategorizations.text: Based on the patient's reported symptoms, physical exam findings, and review of the MRI, the patient's symptoms are consistent with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The sentence references 'review of the MRI' even though no MRI is documented in the Objective section; this is more an internal consistency/documentation issue than a section misplacement. The content itself (diagnostic impression) is appropriate for Assessment.
